name: Whiskey Sour

spec.method_detail: Dry shake if using egg white. Add ice, shake hard. Strain over fresh ice in rocks glass, or up into coupe.

garnish: Lemon wheel, cherry, Angostura bitters drops on foam
history: One of the original cocktail categories — the sour — first published by Jerry Thomas in 1862. Sours are simply spirit + citrus + sweetener, one of the oldest templates in bartending. The Boston Sour adds egg white for a silky foam. The New York Sour floats red wine on top. The Whiskey Sour is the archetypal expression of the format.
